infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LoadQ needs access to your photos so you can set your profile picture (used to identify you to drivers and passengers in the queue) and upload a verification photo of your vehicle for driver approval.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LoadQ may save trip-related images you take to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LoadQ uses the camera so you can take a profile picture or photograph your vehicle for driver verification.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: LoadQ needs your location to detect when you enter a loading zone.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: LoadQ needs your location to detect when you enter a loading zone.
